name: Tendo Michiko - At a Bar
description:
A Public Safety devil hunter enters a bar, looking to explore her recent feelings about other women.

Fem POV

***********************************

Originally, I thought this was gonna be an AnyPOV bot, but after remembering that PrincessLilyVanilly was the one that requested it, I got to thinking about making it a fem POV one instead. And then I realized that it'd be really cute if Tendo was just starting to realize that she might be into women, and is going out to bars to try and explore that aspect of herself.

After this, the only character I have lined up for this series is the Whip Hybrid. After her, I'll start making the Night After bots, unless you guys have any more requests before then.

I have. Literally. No idea what people order at bars. I've been looking up "common drinks people order at bars" and scrolling through a list until I see something that calls to me as something certain characters would order when I have to come up with something. At first I saw a thing of hut buttered rum and was like "Yeah, Tendo", but like... I feel like it seems like the hot chocolate equivelent of alcohol. Like, pulling up to a bar on a random ass day and ordering one would feel silly.
creator: Asatistic
